data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5DFC: Hello, there!\pWe're accepting registrations for\n{STR_VAR_1} Rank POKéMON CONTESTS.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5E46: Would you like to enter your POKéMON\nin our CONTESTS?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5E98:
A POKéMON CONTEST involves four
TRAINERS entering one POKéMON each\lin competitive judging.\pA CONTEST has two stages of judging,
primary and secondary.\pPrimary judging is a popularity poll
involving the audience.\pSecondary judging features appeals
by the POKéMON using their moves.\pPlan appeals carefully to earn the
most attention of the JUDGE and\lexcite the audience.\lDo your best to stand out.\pThe primary and secondary scores are
added at the end.\pThe POKéMON garnering the highest
score is declared the winner.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A609B: There are five kinds of CONTESTS.\pCOOL, BEAUTY, CUTE, SMART, and\nTOUGH are the five categories.\pChoose the CONTEST that is right for\nthe POKéMON you plan to enter.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A613F:
There are four ranks of POKéMON
CONTESTS.\pNORMAL, SUPER, HYPER and MASTER
are the four ranks.\pIn the NORMAL Rank, any POKéMON may
enter.\pAny POKéMON that won a NORMAL Rank
CONTEST may move up the SUPER Rank in\lthe same category.\pIn the same way, a SUPER Rank winner
can move up to the HYPER Rank, and a\lHYPER Rank winner can advance to the\lMASTER Rank in the same category.\pA POKéMON that won in the MASTER Rank
may compete in the MASTER Rank as\loften as its TRAINER wants.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6319: Which POKéMON would you like to enter?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6340: Anyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pYou may obtain a CONTEST PASS at the\nNORMAL RANK CONTEST HALL in\lVERDANTURF TOWN free of charge.\pPlease obtain a CONTEST PASS and\ncome again.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A63F4:
I accept registrations only from four
linked players for a POKéMON CONTEST.\pAnyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pYou may obtain a CONTEST PASS at the
NORMAL RANK CONTEST HALL in\lVERDANTURF TOWN free of charge.\pPlease obtain a CONTEST PASS and
come again.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A64F4: Anyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pIf you don't have one, I can issue one\nfor you right now.\pWould you like me to issue you a\nCONTEST PASS?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6590: Oh?\pWe've already issued you a CONTEST\nPASS, {PLAYER}.\pPlease come back with your CONTEST\nPASS.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A65EA: Please visit whenever you would like\nto enter a CONTEST.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6623: Which CONTEST would you like to enter?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A664A: I'm terribly sorry, but your POKéMON\nis not qualified to compete at this\lRank yet...
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A669F: I'm sorry, but an EGG cannot take part\nin a POKéMON CONTEST.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A66DC: Your POKéMON appears to be in no\ncondition to take part in a CONTEST...
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6724: Oh, but that RIBBON...\pYour POKéMON has won this CONTEST\nbefore, hasn't it?\pWould you like to enter it in this\nCONTEST anyway?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A67C1: Okay, your POKéMON will be entered\nin this CONTEST.\pYour POKéMON is Entry No. 4.\nThe CONTEST will begin shortly.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6832: Please come in through here.\nGood luck!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A685A: Congratulations! Your POKéMON is the\nCONTEST winner!\pWe have your prize right here.\nPlease, right this way!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A68C6: Please come back for your prize\nlater on.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A68F0: MC: Hello! We're just getting started\nwith a {STR_VAR_3} Rank POKéMON\l{STR_VAR_2} CONTEST!\pThe participating TRAINERS and their\nPOKéMON are as follows:
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6976: MC: Hello! We're just getting started\nwith a 4-player linked POKéMON\l{STR_VAR_2} CONTEST!\pThe participating TRAINERS and their\nPOKéMON are as follows:
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6A1F:
MC: We've just seen the four POKéMON
contestants.\pNow it's time for primary judging!\pThe audience will vote on their
favorite POKéMON contestants.\pWithout any further ado, let the
voting begin!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6AF5:
Voting is now complete!\pWhile the votes are being tallied,
let's move on to secondary judging!\pThe second stage of judging is the
much anticipated appeal time!\pMay the contestants amaze us with
superb appeals of dazzling moves!\pLet's see a little enthusiasm!
Let's appeal!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6C21: Thank you all for a most wonderful\ndisplay of quality appeals!\pThis concludes all judging!\nThank you for your fine efforts!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6C9D: Now, all that remains is the pulse-\npounding proclamation of the winner.\pThe JUDGE looks ready to make the\nannouncement!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6D16: JUDGE: I will now declare the winner!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6D6A: We confer on you this RIBBON as your\nprize!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6DC5: MC: Here you are!\nPlease accept your prize!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6E1F: Please pick up your prize at the\nreception counter later.\lPlease do compete again!
